theme_and_archetype.description: A blend of premium editorial fintech (sophisticated serif typography, muted warm backgrounds, deep charcoal text) combined with bold modern SaaS (asymmetric grid structures, striking electric blue color blocks, and interactive widgets).

hierarchy.overline: text-xs md:text-sm font-mono uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-semibold text-[#0052FF]

surfaces.card_default: bg-white border border-black/5 rounded-2xl shadow-sm p-8
surfaces.card_highlight: bg-white border-2 border-[#0052FF] rounded-2xl shadow-md p-8 relative
surfaces.card_dark: bg-[#0A0A0B] text-white border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-8

buttons.primary: bg-[#0052FF] text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-transform hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-lg
buttons.secondary: bg-[#0A0A0B] text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-transform hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.outline: bg-transparent text-[#0A0A0B] border border-black/20 rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-black/5

interactive.rules: Use Shadcn components for forms, tabs, accordions, and sliders (for the ROI calculator). Use pure Tailwind for layout structures.
interactive.testing: MUST include data-testid on all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='roi-slider', data-testid='pricing-starter-cta').

sections.name: Hero
sections.layout: Split asymmetric. Left: Editorial typography (H1: 'Track spending. Catch drift early. Turn budget into action.'), primary + outline CTAs. Right: Hovering 3D dashboard mockup. Background: Muted warm beige with subtle noise texture.

sections.name: Features Bento
sections.layout: Grid-12. Features: Smart Categories, Budget Thresholds, Alerts, AI Coach. Use card_default with crisp iconography. Keep one large hero card (8 cols) and smaller supporting cards (4 cols).

sections.name: ROI Calculator
sections.layout: Interactive Widget. Left side: Explanation and sliders (Monthly Spend, Current Drift %). Right side: Real-time savings readout in large serif text. Use '#0052FF' for slider tracks.

sections.name: Pricing Ladder
sections.layout: Asymmetric 3-Tier Grid. 1. Starter ($5/mo), 2. Growth ($10/mo) - Highlighted with border and slightly taller. 3. Scale ($19.99/mo). Include a 4th dark section below or beside for the 'Managed Service Upsell'. All CTAs link to 'https://budget.konticode.com/checkout.php'.
sections.notes: Middle tier (Growth) should use 'card_highlight'. Managed service should use 'card_dark'.

sections.name: Testimonials
sections.layout: Horizontal scrolling carousel or masonry grid using Unsplash professional portraits. Sophisticated serif quotes.

sections.name: Lead Capture
sections.layout: Muted dark surface (bg-[#0A0A0B]). Form with Name, Email, Company Size (Select), Message. Use Shadcn form components.

sections.name: FAQ
sections.layout: Centered narrow column using Shadcn Accordion. Clean and minimalist.

sections.name: Footer
sections.layout: Large typographic 'Let's Talk' CTA, minimal links, clean grid layout.

budget_app_mockup.description: Use in Hero section. Minimalist modern dashboard interface hovering.

hero_abstract_finance.description: Use as a background overlay or in a feature card.

financial_texture.description: Macro photography of financial report. Use in ROI calculator background or as section divider.

instructions_to_main_agent.1: Use the provided image URLs exclusively. Do not use generic placeholders.
instructions_to_main_agent.2: For fonts, ensure Playfair Display (heading) and Manrope (body) are loaded via Google Fonts in index.html.
instructions_to_main_agent.3: Pricing links must hardcode 'href="https://budget.konticode.com/checkout.php"' as instructed.
instructions_to_main_agent.4: Install framer-motion for micro-interactions, especially in the Hero Mockup.
instructions_to_main_agent.5: Do not skip data-testid attributes. Ensure forms are built using Shadcn Form and React Hook Form.
instructions_to_main_agent.6: Ensure contrast is crisp. The background should be `#F9F8F6` with `#0A0A0B` text.
